metaData.Key Information: Lacys Premium Aluminium Foil is specially designed for commercial kitchen use. It is flexibly strong and supports high temperatures. It also shapes easily and does not rip easily. It has numerous kitchen uses including cooking, wrapping, storing and freezing food. It is also very useful in keeping your barbequed food sizzling hot!<
